Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature / enhancement
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / infrastructure
- [ ] � Intelligence source update
- [ ] 📊 Report template / generation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)

## Affected Areas

- [ ] `tools/` — Python automation
- [ ] `sources/` — Source configuration
- [ ] `reports/` — Report content or templates
- [ ] `references/` — Knowledge base or roadmap
- [ ] `tests/` — Test suite
- [ ] `.github/` — CI / templates / AI instructions
- [ ] Config files (pixi.toml, ruff.toml, Makefile, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] Self-reviewed the code / content
- [ ] All pre-commit hooks pass (`pixi run -e dev pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] Any new Python code passes `ruff check` and `ruff format --check`
- [ ] New functions have type hints and Google-style docstrings
- [ ] Tests added or updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No API keys, secrets, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Taiwan-audience content uses Traditional Chinese (繁體中文) only
